title: A lifesaver
text: This app got me through my worst panic attack. I don't go anywhere without it.

title: Finally something that works
text: I've tried everything. This is the only thing that actually helps in the moment when my brain won't slow down.

title: Always in my dock
text: Deleted a bunch of apps last month. This one stayed. It's just different — it actually meets you where you are.

title: For anyone who gets it
text: If you know what a panic attack feels like you need this. No fluff, just tools that work when you're in it.

title: Genuinely helped
text: I was skeptical but downloaded it during a rough week. Used it twice that first night. Still using it months later.
